body.title: CLOSED: swarm web channel tab — tmux attribution delivery
body.result: added tmux_target to agent registration + _deliver_to_tmux routes WS messages to agent tmux sessions via send-keys; 10 tests green
body.description:
Implement the web server tab UI: each channel renders as a horizontal tab in the agent_datacenter web server. Tabs show the channel stream (messages as they arrive). Users can type into the input field to send a message into the channel, which the shim injects into the target agent's session via send-keys with attribution.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/web_server/device.py, agent_datacenter/devices/web_server/shim.py, new agent_datacenter/devices/web_server/templates/channels.html (or equivalent)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — horizontal tab per channel, stream rendering (SSE or polling), bidirectional input field, attribution on injected messages. OUT — ACL/mute; authentication (deferred); mobile layout.
**Test plan:** smoke test with headless browser (SWADL) — page loads, tabs visible, posting a message into the input triggers a send-keys call on the target session; stream updates appear within 2s of envelope arrival.
**Pass condition:** From a browser, a message typed into the `shared` channel input appears in the target agent's tmux session with attribution within 2 seconds, confirmed by a SWADL smoke test.
